message: WMI-4 arbitrary access (array-index-from-field): the access index is loaded from struct field 'inet_hashinfo.ehash_mask' — the attacker-shaped WMI-3 content followed into an arbitrary memory access. [mechanism:array-index-from-field;indicates=WMI-4] [mem:struct=inet_hashinfo;field=ehash_mask;offset=16] [oracle:assert=ehash_mask governs a bounded, trusted in-bounds array index;assume=access index loaded from the field]
